title: Train Music Pack
description: Add train sounds and platform sounds
body:
This pack added some train approaching sound, departure sound and in-train sounds.
I have beed record, changing to ogg file, and write sounds.json in collection of 2 years to produce this resource pack. If you dont want to do it yourself, this resource pack is right resource pack for you.

If you found any issue fell free to let me know in discord.
this list is generated by ls -a command.
All rights reserved.

List of sounds:
